title: Moved Cities / Student Away
description: How to transfer your voter registration when you move to a new location.

start.content: Are you moving permanently or just temporarily?

temporary_move.content: If you are moving temporarily (e.g., short-term work or short vacation), you should remain registered at your original address. You can travel back to vote.

permanent_move.content: Are you moving within the same Assembly Constituency, or to a completely different one?

check_ac.content: You can check your Assembly Constituency online. Find your polling booth details using the Electoral Search.

same_ac.content: Since you are moving within the same constituency, you just need to update your address. You must submit **Form 8** for shifting of residence within the constituency.

diff_ac.content: Since you are moving to a different constituency, you need to transfer your registration. You must submit **Form 8** for shifting of residence outside the constituency. Your name will be added to the new place and automatically deleted from the old place.

apply_form8.content: You will need a new Proof of Address. You can fill out Form 8 online through the Voter Services Portal.
